commands.evaluate: uv run --locked --extra bench python bench/swe_bench_lite/run.py --evaluate-existing-run swe10-local-YYYYMMDDTHHMMSSZ --confirm-cost --eval-max-workers 1 --eval-namespace none
commands.generate: set -a; source .poor-cli/local-cuda.env; set +a; uv run --locked --extra bench python bench/swe_bench_lite/run.py --graph --agent local --provider "$POOR_CLI_PROVIDER" --model "$POOR_CLI_MODEL" --local-base-url "$POOR_CLI_LOCAL_BASE_URL" --no-evaluate --confirm-cost --timeout-seconds 1200 --run-id swe10-local-YYYYMMDDTHHMMSSZ
